query: Write a short email declining a collaboration invite from another illustrator, in my voice.

gold.task_prompt: Decline a collaboration invite from another illustrator, in my voice.
gold.style_notes: Persona p003: lowercase, emoji-heavy, trailing '!!', signs off 'cheers'. Strong distinctive signal.

metadata.scoring_note: No gold text. Scored by held-out stylometric pair-classifier P(persona=p003) after an adequacy gate. Held-out style docs are NOT in the corpus shown to systems.
